title: Behavioral Evidence, Values, Equity, and Accessible Hiring · Hiring Signal Forensics
summary: A realistic behavioral evidence, values, equity, and accessible hiring artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in behavioral evidence and access response bank and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Choose a specific relevant situation and explain context, responsibility, action, decision, observable result, reflection, and transfer limit.
Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony.
Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Order the regression proof · Debug Jurisdiction Boundary
steps.instruction:
Order the Jurisdiction Boundary evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Order the regression proof · Debug Jurisdiction Boundary.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Jurisdiction Boundary assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Order the regression proof · Debug Jurisdiction Boundary, keep Jurisdiction Boundary connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Distinguish general ethical practice from location-specific rights, protected categories, disclosure rules, background checks, and qualified advice.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Jurisdiction Boundary has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Order the regression proof · Debug Jurisdiction Boundary, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Jurisdiction Boundary precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Order the regression proof · Debug Jurisdiction Boundary, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Distinguish general ethical practice from location-specific rights, protected categories, disclosure rules, background checks, and qualified advice.

For Order the regression proof · Debug Jurisdiction Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: U.S. employment guidance applies globally and permanently.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the debug Jurisdiction Boundary case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the debug Jurisdiction Boundary case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the debug Jurisdiction Boundary case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the debug Jurisdiction Boundary case
